seo.title: Sathu | Thai temples, culture and reflections
seo.description: Discover Thai temples, daily wisdom, and Boon in one calm, beautifully designed app.

hero.eyebrow: A calmer guide to Thai temples
hero.title: Thai temples, daily wisdom, and Boon in one beautiful app.
hero.lead: Sathu helps people discover temples across Thailand, explore cultural context, and return to a calmer rhythm through daily reflections.
hero.body: It is not just a temple directory. It is a warm, bilingual companion for travellers, curious visitors, and people who want a gentler way into Thai Buddhist culture.
hero.note: Free to explore on iPhone, iPad, and Android.

card.label: Inside the app
card.title: Discover, learn, and reflect
card.body: Browse temples, open maps, read context, and continue the experience with Boon in the same calm product.

features.title: Designed to feel calm, useful, and welcoming
features.lead: Every part of the experience is built to make temple discovery feel clear, respectful, and easy to return to.

temples.title: Find temples that are worth the stop
temples.body: Explore Thai temples with images, distance, and practical visitor details so the next visit feels simple, not random.

culture.title: Read history and cultural background
culture.body: Move beyond names on a map with temple background, significance, and readable context in a clean experience.

daily.title: Open a small reflective moment each day
daily.body: Sathu brings gentle blessings and reflections into the same space as temple discovery, so the app can stay with you beyond the visit itself.

language.title: Made for both Thai and English
language.body: Switch languages instantly and keep the experience approachable for locals, travellers, and international users.

maps.title: Search and continue your journey faster
maps.body: Search by name, open maps quickly, and use temple information that supports real visits instead of abstract browsing.

boon.title: A calmer companion inside Sathu
boon.body1: Boon gives Sathu a more personal side. When users want to ask, reflect, or keep going after exploring a temple, Boon is there inside the app.
boon.body2: He is designed to feel warm, respectful, and easy to approach, giving the product a memorable character instead of a generic chat feature.
boon.quote: Hi — I’m Boon. How can I be with you today?

audience.title: Useful for visitors, learners, and everyday moments
audience.lead: Sathu works as a discovery tool, a cultural guide, and a softer daily habit.

travel.title: Travellers in Thailand
travel.body: Find nearby temples, get oriented faster, and understand what you are visiting without losing time.

learn.title: Curious learners
learn.body: Explore Thai Buddhist culture in a way that feels more human and more welcoming than scattered search results.

reflect.title: People looking for calm
reflect.body: Return for daily reflections and Boon when you want a quieter, more thoughtful moment.

download.title: Download Sathu and experience Thailand’s temples with more clarity
download.body: Available on the App Store and Google Play, with support, privacy, and terms also available online.

footer.disclaimer: Boon is an AI-powered feature inside Sathu. Responses can be imperfect and should not replace professional guidance.

assets.templeAlt: Temple detail view in the Sathu app
assets.boonAlt: Boon chat inside the Sathu app
assets.boonAvatarAlt: Illustration of Boon from the Sathu app
